channel.title: Boost your {`css in Js`} styling speed! (Vs code)
channel.description:
Hi everyone! I shure that most new Frontity developers like me, which had not worked with styling in Js before, face one same problem:
> Its is impossible to **write css productively and fast**! Styling becomes slow like you write in simple Notepad. No hints and spippets.
So I have decided to deal with this problem once and for all and found a perfect plugin for Vs code: **[https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=jpoissonnier.vscode-styled-components]**
Hope this was helpful)))

item.title: Boost your {`css in Js`} styling speed! (Vs code)
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi @borysenko.alexander,

I have never even thought about looking for it, thanks!

Read full topic
item.source: Boost your {`css in Js`} styling speed! (Vs code)

item.title: Boost your {`css in Js`} styling speed! (Vs code)
item.dc:creator: borysenko.alexander
item.description:
Hi everyone! I shure that most new Frontity developers like me, which had not worked with styling in Js before, face one same problem:

Its is impossible to write css productively and fast!
Styling becomes slow like you write in simple Notepad. No hints and spippets.

So I have decided to deal with this problem once and for all and found a perfect plugin for Vs code:
[vscode-styled-components - Visual Studio Marketplace]

Hope this was helpful)))

Read full topic
item.source: Boost your {`css in Js`} styling speed! (Vs code)
